data.title: GoDaddy Falls On Q4 EPS Miss, But 2025 Outlook Promises AI-Powered Growth And Cash Flow Surge
data.description: GoDaddy reported Q4 results, beating revenue and missing EPS consensus. Outlook includes revenue and cash flow targets.

data.title: US Retail Sales Fall More Than Expected In January, Raise Growth Concerns
data.description: Consumer spending fell sharply in January, raising concerns about economic growth. Fed closely watching as retail sales decline and inflation rises.

data.title: Albany International To Shift Operations In Italy: What's Next?
data.description: Albany International announces the shift of operations from its Ballo, Italy facility to Merone, aiming to streamline costs and align with market demand.

data.title: Best Value Stocks to Buy for February 14th
data.description:
Here are two stocks with buy rank and strong value characteristics for investors to consider today, February 14th:

Adtalem Global Education Inc. ATGE: This workforce solutions company carries a Zacks Rank #1, and has witnessed the Zacks Consensus Estimate for its current year earnings increasing 2.6% over the last 60 days.

data.title: Airbnb Posts Strong Q4: Global Expansion Strategy To Lend Upside To Growth Rates, Analysts Say
data.description: Airbnb's Q4 results beat expectations, with strong demand for global travel & investment in new markets. Analysts have a positive outlook for growth & revenue streams.
